title: Eva sheet music chords
summary:
[]: Eva sheet music/chords             Quote Post by Kiel » Wed Sep 22, 2004 7:49 pm Somebody help me! I'm in search of some Evangelion musical notations. Specifically, the piano/guitar chords for "Cruel Angel's Thesis". I'm well aware of the tab pages on the web, that's not what I'm really looking for. Any help would be greatly appriciated Arigato.

[]:             Quote Post by Quiddity » Thu Sep 23, 2004 9:56 pm I second the request although I'm not looking for Cruel Angel's Thesis, but rather sheet music of the Bach pieces in End of Eva...

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat Sep 25, 2004 1:18 am i downloaded most of the songs from a site called appasionata...it seems to have gone offline... try a google search for eva sheet music...somethings bound to turn up... http://www.pianofiles.com/member.php?id=122028 also try this...i found this from a google search "neon genesis evangelion sheet music"
